meta.title: Microlearning Techniques To Improve Cybersecurity Awareness Training
meta.description:
Employees who participate in microtraining experience 50% higher engagement in learning activities; 70% improvement on implementation of skills learned; 94% satisfaction rate with microlearning platforms.

Popular microtraining techniques such as Just in Time, Demonstration, Gamification, and Flash training techniques offer opportunities for learners to intuitively select the way that they learn best.

Lindsey will show sample training programs featuring each of the microlearning techniques in monthly, quarterly, and yearly options along with the training program that she personally designed and implement at my electric cooperative.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
